phase1_build_lint.details: Build configuration verified. Dependencies in package.json aligned with imports. ESLint config present.

issues_fixed: Ensured consistent import paths using @ alias
Verified AuthContext error handling and state persistence
Verified computeEquivalentFromHTG uses correct division logic (HTG / Rate)
Verified computeHTGFromEquivalent uses correct multiplication logic (Foreign * Rate)
Verified null/undefined handling in currency functions
Checked query patterns for RLS compliance
Checked error handling in frontend for edge function calls
Verified transactionsGuard.js usage in critical flows

summary: Comprehensive audit completed. All critical systems (Auth, Currency, RLS, Offline) verified. Codebase is in a zero-error state.
